title: ‘Fire Raining From Sky’: Jaisalmer Simmers At 46°C, Camels Seek Refuge As Traffic Vanishes
description: Jaisalmer reels under an intense Thar heatwave at 46°C as ‘loo’ winds lash the desert city, emptying streets by afternoon, forcing camels to seek ponds and residents to hunt for cold water amid curfew-like silence.
